title: Trim Particle
description: Adds Particle Effect To Trimmed Armor
body:
Feeling dull in your brand new armor trims? Bring your gear to life!
-------------------------------------------------------------------------
This is a Minecraft Datapack(1.21+) that rewards players for collecting and wearing a full set of matching armor trims by surrounding them with unique vanilla particle effects. Whether it's a shadowy aura of Sculk Souls for the Silence trim or a breezy Gust effect for the Flow trim, this addon adds a fresh layer of visual progression to your server.

No additional resourcepack needed!

| Trim Name | Particle Effect |
| --- | --- |
| **Special** |  |
| `silence` | `SCULK_SOUL` |
| `tide` | `TRIAL_SPAWNER_DETECTION_OMINOUS` |
| **Rare Trims** |  |
| `flow` | `SMALL_GUST` |
| `bolt` | `GLOW` |
| `rib` | `SOUL_FIRE_FLAME` |
| `vex` | `ENCHANT` |
| `spire` | `END_ROD` |
| **Common Trims** |  |
| `wild` | `PALE_OAK_LEAVES` |
| `dune` | `VAULT_CONNECTION` |
| `coast` | `BUBBLE_POP` |
| `sentry` | `INFESTED` |
| `ward` | `SCULK_CHARGE_POP` |
| `snout` | `FIREFLY` |
| **Very Common Trims** |  |
| `host` | `EGG_CRACK` |
| `raiser` | `EGG_CRACK` |
| `shaper` | `EGG_CRACK` |
| `wayfinder` | `EGG_CRACK` |
| `eye` | `EGG_CRACK` |

In First Person, particles will only centered around player's feet; minimizing vision blocking
![First Person Particles](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8536e5ad1887140138e74a3635d0dd64b2d18e44_0.webp)
